title: Thread Library Abstraction and Implementation
description: A flowchart illustrating the role of thread libraries as an interface between user applications and the operating system for thread management.
elements: Thread Library API (e.g., Pthreads, Java Threads)
relationships: Application calls the Thread Library API to create/manage threads
Thread Library maps User-Level Threads (ULTs) onto Kernel-Level Threads (KLTs) for execution
Kernel schedules Kernel-Level Threads onto CPU cores
